subject: Honedge — a floating sword Pokemon with a blue cloth trailing from the hilt
description: A sword-shaped Pokemon hovers in a swirling pale white and grey environment with a sense of rapid motion. The blade is steel-grey with a faint metallic sheen. A trailing blue cloth hangs from the hilt, the diagnostic feature of this species. The sword is depicted in a three-quarter downward angle as if mid-flight or striking. There is no humanoid figure in the image — the entity IS the sword. The background is mostly white and pale grey with motion-blur brushwork suggesting ethereal speed.
foreground: steel-grey blade with blue cloth trailing from hilt, motion blur
background: swirling pale white and grey, motion blur
emotion: no face; movement conveys aggressive energy
